sentences.arabic: كَانَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ مُصْطَفَى لَا يُحِبُّ الْقِرَاءَةَ.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Mustafa koji nije volio čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Mustafa who did not like reading.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ أَخُوهُ كِتَابًا عَنِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ فِيهِ صُوَرٌ كَثِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Brat mu je dao knjigu o životinjama s mnogo slika.
sentences.translationEn: His brother gave him a book about animals with many pictures.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ مُصْطَفَى بِقِرَاءَةِ الْكِتَابِ وَلَمْ يَتَوَقَّفْ حَتَّى انْتَهَى.
sentences.translation: Mustafa je počeo čitati knjigu i nije stao dok nije završio.
sentences.translationEn: Mustafa started reading the book and did not stop until he finished.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْ أَخِيهِ كِتَابًا آخَرَ فِي الْيَوْمِ التَّالِي.
sentences.translation: Sljedećeg dana je zamolio brata za još jednu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: The next day he asked his brother for another book.
